caption:
The silence of the university library at 2 AM is heavy, wrapped in leather and dust motes dancing in the streetlights outside. I adjust the collar of my cream silk blouse, feeling the fabric hug my chest, a second skin that hides the full sweep of my curves while daringly suggesting them. I am Professor V, and I wear my authority like armor, but tonight, the armor feels more like lingerie. The door clicks shut behind me, sealing out the hum of the hallway and the distant murmur of students who will soon flood the campus. I run a hand down my skirt, feeling the cotton blend against my thighs, secure in the knowledge that my figure is concealed, yet undeniably present. I pour a glass of water, watching my reflection in the darkened window, noting the way the light catches the swell of my hips. This is the meta-game, the performance of the professor who knows exactly how to command a room not just with words, but with presence. I lean back against the mahogany desk, the leather cool against my back. The papers on the desk are red, marked with grades. I pick up one, the weight of it grounding me. I am creating a story for them, and I am living it myself, the heat rising in the room as the air conditioning hums. I pull the blazer off my shoulders slightly, letting the fabric slide off, just enough to let the blouse breathe, a small rebellion against the formality. The shadows stretch across the floor, long and inviting, mirroring the way my body stretches into the space around me.

#ProfessorLife #UniversityVibes #SecretTeacher #AcademicChic #LateNightStudy #CurvyTeacher #MetaStory #InstaStory
